title: The Sky Darkens
description: Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.
scene: Across pages 18, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Skypieans and Shandia face Enel’s lightning judgment as the battle becomes a desperate fight to save everyone beneath the clouds.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hold up with strings or something similar.
